officialRewards.title: Official Reward Tier 1
officialRewards.description: Earn 10 or more badges, including at least 6 skill badges.

officialRewards.title: Official Reward Tier 2
officialRewards.description: Earn 18 or more badges, including at least 9 skill badges.

officialRewards.title: Official Reward Tier 3
officialRewards.description: Earn 32 or more badges, including at least 16 skill badges.
